name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones
quirks: Only use advanced codecs when both PipeWire and the headset report support; otherwise stay on stable AAC/SBC A2DP.
Do not use HFP/HSP as a music playback optimization.
Codec-specific latency floors keep A2DP quality intact while giving AAC, aptX Adaptive, and SBC-XQ enough buffer to avoid underruns.
source_notes: Bose QuietComfort Ultra materials discuss Bluetooth multipoint and Qualcomm aptX Adaptive support on compatible sources.
